steps.title: Identify the key proportion in the finding
steps.content: ”As many as half of the hunters in those populations were female” establishes the substantial proportion that the accepted view must have contradicted.

steps.title: Match the contradicted belief
steps.content: Negligible (very small or unimportant) is the direct opposite of “half”—the accepted view wrongly held female participation was insignificant. The others either don't address magnitude (inevitable, satisfactory) or would make the finding unsurprising (commonplace). That matches choice C — C is correct.
